name: Penthouse Mirador del Rodeo 1.1
description:
Welcome to Penthouse Mirador del Rodeo 1.1, a beautifully renovated 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom duplex penthouse perfectly positioned between Puerto Banús and San Pedro de Alcántara. Set in a peaceful gated complex just moments from the beach, this spacious and stylish retreat is ideal for families or groups looking to enjoy a sun-soaked escape while staying close to Marbella’s top attractions.

This modern penthouse is split across two levels and has been thoughtfully designed with comfort, functionality, and aesthetics in mind. On the main floor, you’ll find a bright and airy living area furnished with warm tones and contemporary details, opening onto a covered terrace that invites in the Mediterranean breeze. The fully equipped kitchen offers everything needed for home-cooked meals or light bites before a day out exploring the coast. Each bedroom is uniquely styled and furnished for relaxation, including a generous master suite with an en-suite bathroom. Two of the other bedrooms share a stylish family bathroom, and the fourth bedroom includes its own en-suite, making the layout ideal for both families and friends.

One of the standout features of the property is the private rooftop terrace, a spacious and sun-drenched area fitted with sun loungers, an outdoor lounge, and a BBQ setup—perfect for unwinding, entertaining, or simply enjoying long afternoons under the Costa del Sol sky. The terrace offers both privacy and panoramic views, creating an atmosphere that’s hard to beat.

The penthouse sits just next door to Padel Real, Marbella’s most iconic padel and fitness club, making it a dream stay for those who enjoy active holidays. A well-stocked supermarket and the beach are both within easy walking distance, and you're just a 3–5 minute taxi ride from the dining, nightlife, and shopping scenes of Puerto Banús and the relaxed charm of San Pedro. The gated community also features a large swimming pool and a separate children’s pool, offering something for every member of the family to enjoy.

Whether you’re here to relax, explore, stay fit, or entertain, Penthouse Mirador del Rodeo 1.1 is a standout home base that combines style, location, and comfort for an unforgettable stay on the Costa del Sol.

Please note that we welcome families and couples only, no groups under 30, and no hen or stag parties. Should you fall outside of this category but wish to book nonetheless, please send us an enquiry detailing a bit more about yourself and the group that you will be travelling with so we can request this for you.
rules: No groups under 30 years of age
